svg.aria-label: January 2026 security digest monthly index covering 9 daily digests : Microsoft AitM phishing, VMware vCenter KEV, Sandworm DynoWiper Polish grid attack, n8n RCE CVE-2026-1470, LLMjacking on 175000 Ollama servers, ShinyHunters vishing MFA bypass, OT systems attack from CERT Polska.
svg.title: 2026-01 Monthly Index: AitM phishing, VMware KEV, AI agent NHI, LLMjacking

g.text: Phone-based MFA bypass : Mandiant first official report
CVSS 9.9 : pre-auth workflow RCE : patch immediately
Unauthenticated inference endpoints exposed to internet
